text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm tidying up after training one<n>day, I happen
to spot a suspicious<n>figure lurking about...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'd say that she needs a single<n>poke
there. As for her... maybe ten<n>pokes would do...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oops, you caught me! ☆ But no<n>worries! I haven't
laid a needle on<n>anyone yet.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I just came here to conduct<n>visualization training
for my<n>treatments. I have only the best<n>wishes
for Umamusume-kind's bright<n>future! ☆
choice_data_list: I'm just going to call the cops real quick...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, stop! Let's not get hasty! Put<n>down the
phone for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me that you don't care<n>if the
(self-proclaimed) crown jewel of<n>the
acupuncture world, Sasami<n>Anshinzawa, is gone
forever?!
choice_data_list: The safety of my trainee comes first.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But you must trust me when I say<n>this—I have
always wished for<n>Umamusume to succeed and
flourish!<n>From the bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: See? We're two peas in a pod.
choice_data_list: I'd love to believe you, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just look at the reviews on<n>our
homepage! "Thanks to<n>acupuncture, I finally got
first place!"<n>"Ever since I got treated, every day<n>
has been sunshine and rainbows!"

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
See? Nothing but five-star reviews! ☆<n>They're all
for my master, but still!
choice_data_list: Fine, but no more trespassing, all right?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, you're really letting mego scot-free?! So you can bereasoned with after all! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know! Let me give you a free<n>treatment
session as thanks! It'll be a<n>great chance for you
to become<n>mighty and strong!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If it goes well, that is... But I'm sure it<n>will! See,
no worries! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I refuse her offer, but I was able to<n>learn a bit
more about acupuncture<n>through this experience.
